text: Entering this vibrant and modern space, I feel an electric undercurrent of possibility. The shifting blue and purple light seeping through the glass resonates with the theme of research and development—of things in flux, always becoming. Ideas seem to pulse from the walls, and I sense that I am both observer and participant in a living experiment. I feel anticipation and openness as if the room itself is inviting me to innovate, reflect, and connect with the ongoing dance between human curiosity and technological progress.
